zh.lifeSummary: 當Ada II de Hugleville於1035年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利福馬賀時，她的父親Richard FitzGilbert de Saint Valéry30歲，母親Ada d'Hugleville31歲。她於1049年與Geoffrey de Neufmarché在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利福馬賀結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1114年在她的家鄉享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ada II de Hugleville于1035年出生在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利福馬賀时，她的父亲Richard FitzGilbert de Saint Valéry30岁，母亲Ada d'Hugleville31岁。她于1049年与Geoffrey de Neufmarché在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利福馬賀结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1114年在她的家乡享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ada
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin; it was not in general use before the late 18th century. It may be a Latinate variant of the biblical name Adah . However, it has also been explained as a pet form of Adele and Adelaide , Germanic female names of which the first element is adal ‘noble’. It was borne by a 7th-century abbess of Saint-Julien-des-Prés at Le Mans.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Ada II de Hugleville was born in 1035, in Neufmarché, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, her father, Richard FitzGilbert de Saint Valéry, was 30 and her mother, Ada d'Hugleville, was 31. She married Geoffrey de Neufmarché in 1049, in Neufmarché, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1114, in her hometown, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ada II de Hugleville est née en 1035, à Neufmarché, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Richard FitzGilbert de Saint Valéry, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Ada d'Hugleville, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Geoffrey de Neufmarché en 1049, à Neufmarché, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1114, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ada II de Hugleville 1035 in Neufmarché, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard FitzGilbert de Saint Valéry 30 und ihre Mutter Ada d'Hugleville 31. Sie hat 1049 in Neufmarché, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich Geoffrey de Neufmarché geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1114 im Alter von 79 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ada II de Hugleville è nata il nel 1035 nel Neufmarché, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Richard FitzGilbert de Saint Valéry, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Ada d'Hugleville, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Geoffrey de Neufmarché nel 1049, nel Neufmarché, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1114, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ada II de Huglevilleが1035年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメネウフマルチeで生まれた時，父Richard FitzGilbert de Saint Valéryは30歳，母Ada d'Huglevilleは31歳であった。1049年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメネウフマルチeでGeoffrey de Neufmarchéと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1114年に故郷で79歳で死去した。

ko.St Valerie: 캐나다 퀘벡 레스 마스쿠테인스 세인트 발리
ko.lifeSummary: Ada II de Hugleville(이)가 1035년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 니우프마che에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard FitzGilbert de Saint Valéry(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ada d'Hugleville(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1049년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 니우프마che에서 Geoffrey de Neufmarché(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1114년 그녀의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ada II de Hugleville nasceu em 1035, em Neufmarché, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Richard FitzGilbert de Saint Valéry, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Ada d'Hugleville, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Geoffrey de Neufmarché em 1049, em Neufmarché, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1114, em sua cidade natal, com 79 anos.

ru.St Valerie: сеинт веилириен, лесь маскоутеинс, Квебек, Канада
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ada II de Hugleville родилась в 1035 г. в местности неуфмарчe, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Richard FitzGilbert de Saint Valéry было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Ada d'Hugleville, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffrey de Neufmarché в 1049 г. в местности неуфмарчe, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1114 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 79 лет.

Se casó con Geoffrey de Neufmarché en 1049, en Neufmarché, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1114, en su pueblo, a la edad de 79 años.
